overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring an abandoned industrial underground facility at night. The player character walks through a derelict concrete parking garage, transitions through narrow corridors with sandbag barriers, traverses a dark tunnel, and emerges into an outdoor rocky area with a large concrete pipe structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned underground parking garage with debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the derelict concrete garage, surveying the abandoned vehicles and debris

entered.detail: large structural support column with weathered surface
derelict car with rusted body parked against the wall
wooden shipping crates stacked in a pile
large industrial ductwork running along the ceiling
scattered rubble and broken concrete on the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide abandoned industrial garage with concrete pillars and scattered debris. The player walks forward through the space, passing abandoned vehicles and stacked crates while overhead ventilation pipes run along the ceiling. The environment is dimly lit with artificial lighting, creating a cool blue-green atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with sandbag barriers

events.description: exits the open garage into a narrow corridor with corrugated metal walls and sandbag barriers

agents.ego_description: proceeding cautiously through the narrow corridor, approaching a figure with a flashlight

notable_agents.action: standing stationary in the corridor holding a bright flashlight

entered.detail: rusted metal sheeting covering the corridor wall
stacked sandbags forming a partial wall barrier
industrial metal rack with empty shelves
exposed brick masonry wall at corridor end

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the open garage into a narrow enclosed corridor lined with corrugated metal and sandbag barriers. A stationary NPC holding a flashlight stands in the middle of the path ahead. The space becomes more confined with industrial shelving and exposed brick walls visible as the player advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete tunnel with distant exit light

events.description: enters a very dark tunnel section with minimal ambient light
distant circular exit becomes visible at the end of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the pitch-black tunnel toward the distant light at the exit

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete walls of the cylindrical tunnel
bright circular opening at the far end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark concrete tunnel where visibility drops significantly. The environment is enclosed with smooth concrete walls, and the only illumination comes from a distant circular exit light that grows gradually larger as the player approaches. The ground shows signs of water and debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor rocky area with large concrete pipe exit

events.description: emerges from the dark tunnel into an outdoor area with night sky visible

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the tunnel into the open air, looking up at the figure standing on the pipe structure

notable_agents.action: figure standing motionless on top of the large concrete pipe exit

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete pipe emerging from the rocky terrain
steep rocky cliff face surrounding the exit area
scrub bushes and grass growing around the pipe exit
dark night sky visible above the rocky walls
rusted metal ladder attached to the rock wall

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the tunnel into a wide outdoor area surrounded by rock cliffs. A massive concrete pipe dominates the scene, with a figure standing atop it. The environment transitions from enclosed darkness to open night air, with sparse vegetation and a metal ladder visible against the rock walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dimly lit industrial garage through a series of confining passages and into an open nocturnal landscape. It begins by moving through a wide concrete garage filled with debris and abandoned vehicles under a cool blue-green artificial glow. As the camera advances, the open space narrows into a confined corridor of corrugated metal and sandbag barriers, passing a stationary figure with a flashlight. The scene then shifts into a dark, damp concrete tunnel where visibility drops, leaving only a distant circular light to guide the way forward. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness into the open night air of a rocky canyon, where a massive concrete pipe and a figure standing atop it dominate the horizon.
